text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally the day of Haru Urara's debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After winning at many of my "contests," she feels
confident that she's grown stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she heads to her first competitive race.
